title: Dental Implants
tagline: Permanent, lifelike replacements for missing teeth
summary: Computer-guided titanium implants restored with custom porcelain crowns — engineered to last decades and feel like your own.
description: Our implant programme uses 3D CBCT planning, fully sterile surgical protocols, and premium Swiss & German implant systems. From single-tooth replacements to full-arch All-on-4 reconstructions, every case is treated as a precision restoration project.

faqs.a: Placement is performed under local anaesthesia and is generally easier than a routine extraction. Most patients return to work the next day.
With proper hygiene, modern implants have a 95%+ success rate over 15+ years and can last a lifetime.
Most healthy adults qualify. We confirm bone volume with a 3D scan during your free consult.

title: Cosmetic Dentistry
summary: Smile design, porcelain veneers, gum aesthetics & whitening — engineered around your facial proportions, not a generic template.
description: Every cosmetic case begins with a digital smile design (DSD). We mock up the result on your photographs and let you preview it before a single tooth is touched.

faqs.a: Modern minimally-prep veneers preserve nearly all natural enamel. We always discuss reversibility upfront.
Quality porcelain veneers, well cared for, last 12–20 years on average.

title: Orthodontics & Aligners
summary: From traditional braces to clear Invisalign aligners — discreet, predictable tooth alignment for teens and adults.
description: We offer the full orthodontic spectrum — metal, ceramic, lingual, and clear aligners — supervised by certified orthodontists with thousands of finished cases.
procedure: Retention to lock in your result

faqs.q: Am I too old for braces?
faqs.a: Healthy teeth move at any age. Roughly 30% of our orthodontic patients are 30+.

title: Root Canal Therapy
summary: Save your natural tooth from extraction with modern, virtually painless rotary endodontics — typically completed in one visit.
description: Using rotary NiTi instrumentation, apex locators, and bioceramic sealers, we resolve infection while preserving as much natural tooth as possible.

title: Gum Treatment
summary: Periodontal therapy from scaling to advanced gum surgery — because no smile is complete without healthy foundations.
description: Untreated gum disease is the leading cause of tooth loss in adults. Our hygiene programme combines ultrasonic deep cleans, laser-assisted therapy, and home-care coaching.

title: Pediatric Dentistry
summary: A friendly, anxiety-free environment for children's first dental visits — with preventive care designed around growing smiles.
description: Our pediatric area is purpose-built with TVs, toys, and a fear-free coaching protocol. We focus on prevention, fluoride therapy, sealants, and gentle interceptive orthodontics.

title: Teeth Whitening
tagline: Up to 8 shades brighter, in one visit
summary: Clinically-supervised in-chair whitening combined with at-home top-ups for safe, dazzling results that don't damage enamel.
description: We use enamel-safe, professionally-formulated whitening systems with desensitising agents to deliver dramatic results without the post-op sensitivity of high-street kits.

title: Porcelain Veneers
summary: Ultra-thin layered porcelain shells that transform colour, shape, and proportion — bonded with minimal tooth reduction.
description: Each veneer is hand-layered by master ceramists in our partner laboratory and bonded under a microscope for a seamless margin.

title: Crowns & Bridges
tagline: Restore broken or missing teeth, naturally
summary: All-ceramic crowns and bridges that look indistinguishable from natural teeth and are built to last.
description: We use modern monolithic zirconia and lithium disilicate ceramics — exceptionally strong, perfectly colour-matched, and metal-free.

title: Dentures
summary: From premium flexible partials to implant-stabilised full dentures — precisely fitted, beautifully natural.
description: Modern dentures look and feel nothing like the dentures of a generation ago. Our digital workflow ensures a precise fit on day one.

title: Emergency Dental Care
tagline: 24/7 — because pain doesn't keep office hours
summary: Same-day appointments for trauma, abscesses, broken crowns and severe pain. After-hours hotline for true emergencies.
description: Our triage protocol prioritises pain relief and infection control on the same day. After-hours, our on-call doctor responds via WhatsApp within 15 minutes.

title: General Dentistry
tagline: Routine care that protects your smile for life
summary: Check-ups, fillings, cleanings, x-rays and preventive care — the foundation of long-term oral health.
description: Our 6-monthly recall programme includes a full exam, hygienist clean, digital x-rays as needed, and an oral-cancer screening.
